item.title: Fondato nel 2007 da Vinca Kruk e Daniel van der Velden, il lavoro di Metahaven s...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (3 medier)

@metahaven

Fondato nel 2007 da Vinca Kruk e Daniel van der Velden, il lavoro di Metahaven spazia tra design, cinema, installazione e scrittura. La loro pratica esplora il ruolo fondamentale della poesia e i legami tra arte e scienza, radicandosi in una visione dell’internet come struttura decentralizzata. Le loro opere sono conservate, tra le altre, nelle collezioni del Guggenheim Museum Bilbao, della Sharjah Art Foundation, dello Stedelijk Museum Amsterdam e della National Gallery of Victoria. Attualmente, il collettivo è consulente artistico presso la Rijksakademie e dirige il Master in Geo-Design alla Design Academy Eindhoven. Se vuoi esplorare anche tu come loro, Daniel sarà a DESINA04, dal 9 al 12 aprile 2026 a Napoli.

Acquista il tuo ticket al link in bio.

#desina04 #resist #design #visualdesign

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (3 medier)

@metahaven

Fondato nel 2007 da Vinca Kruk e Daniel van der Velden, il lavoro di Metahaven spazia tra design, cinema, installazione e scrittura. La loro pratica esplora il ruolo fondamentale della poesia e i legami tra arte e scienza, radicandosi in una visione dell’internet come struttura decentralizzata. Le loro opere sono conservate, tra le altre, nelle collezioni del Guggenheim Museum Bilbao, della Sharjah Art Foundation, dello Stedelijk Museum Amsterdam e della National Gallery of Victoria. Attualmente, il collettivo è consulente artistico presso la Rijksakademie e dirige il Master in Geo-Design alla Design Academy Eindhoven. Se vuoi esplorare anche tu come loro, Daniel sarà a DESINA04, dal 9 al 12 aprile 2026 a Napoli.

Acquista il tuo ticket al link in bio.

#desina04 #resist #design #visualdesign

item.title: we are so proud of this MA department, its alumni, and of the current students a...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (12 medier)

@metahaven

we are so proud of this MA department, its alumni, and of the current students and their processes. if you are interested in joining Geo, please apply by March 30 (through link in bio or through dae.nl). the slides are a selection of graduation works - single images that do not do justice to the qualities of each

Se slideshow på Instagram

@metahaven

we are so proud of this MA department, its alumni, and of the current students and their processes. if you are interested in joining Geo, please apply by March 30 (through link in bio or through dae.nl). the slides are a selection of graduation works - single images that do not do justice to the qualities of each

item.author: metahaven

item.title: “Latent Spacecraft: Brains, GANs, Finnegans” is out today. (DOI 10.1162/ANTI.5KP...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@metahaven

“Latent Spacecraft: Brains, GANs, Finnegans” is out today. (DOI 10.1162/ANTI.5KPI). This project argues that latent space—the learned, multidimensional, representational substrate of neural networks—is not only a mathematical construct but, read through literature, a structure akin to architectural interiority that renders the abstract physically legible. We stage three case studies to trace deep homologies between biological and synthetic language: (1) speech-producing brains alongside speech-generating GANs, which learn by informative imitation and exhibit imagitation, which exceeds mere replication; (2) James Joyce’s Finnegans Wake as a cartography of latent space, where nonce words and associative syntax model pre-narrative interiority; and (3) FinneGANs, a GAN trained on Finnegans Wake audio, whose outputs probe the limits of comprehensibility and pre-speech form. Across these isomorphs, we contend that language is a final, linearizing layer over a generative, precategorial interior. Architecture serves as a navigable armature of the interior, where the symbolic layer is often physical, all the way to the deepest layers. 🌑 Find the article and the models at latentspacecraft.antikythera.org 🌑 Nina Beguš, Metahaven, Gašper Beguš with Metahaven and Riccardo Petrini 🌑 Slides: 1. Title / 2. FinneGAN model / 3. Scroll / 4. The Thick Cursor / 5. fiwGAN model

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@metahaven

“Latent Spacecraft: Brains, GANs, Finnegans” is out today. (DOI 10.1162/ANTI.5KPI). This project argues that latent space—the learned, multidimensional, representational substrate of neural networks—is not only a mathematical construct but, read through literature, a structure akin to architectural interiority that renders the abstract physically legible. We stage three case studies to trace deep homologies between biological and synthetic language: (1) speech-producing brains alongside speech-generating GANs, which learn by informative imitation and exhibit imagitation, which exceeds mere replication; (2) James Joyce’s Finnegans Wake as a cartography of latent space, where nonce words and associative syntax model pre-narrative interiority; and (3) FinneGANs, a GAN trained on Finnegans Wake audio, whose outputs probe the limits of comprehensibility and pre-speech form. Across these isomorphs, we contend that language is a final, linearizing layer over a generative, precategorial interior. Architecture serves as a navigable armature of the interior, where the symbolic layer is often physical, all the way to the deepest layers. 🌑 Find the article and the models at latentspacecraft.antikythera.org 🌑 Nina Beguš, Metahaven, Gašper Beguš with Metahaven and Riccardo Petrini 🌑 Slides: 1. Title / 2. FinneGAN model / 3. Scroll / 4. The Thick Cursor / 5. fiwGAN model

item.author: metahaven

item.title: it’s been a huge joy to work with @n_a_l_b_a_n_d_i_a_n on the cover for his late...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (2 medier)

@metahaven

it’s been a huge joy to work with @n_a_l_b_a_n_d_i_a_n on the cover for his latest album, “studies on resonance and dissonance” - a project armen created closely together with @jingy.teo . armen nalbandian’s work brings motives from jazz and classical piano into a sphere of improvisation and noise, combining (in a way) satie with ruins and far beyond. thank you armen and jing 🔥🧶💫

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (2 medier)

@metahaven

item.title: The Feeling Sonnets (Transitional Object), 2024 - excerpt. Now at @loopbarcelona...
item.description:
🎬 Video

@metahaven

The Feeling Sonnets (Transitional Object), 2024 - excerpt. Now at @loopbarcelona w/ @ticktack.be - cc @amelie.haest @millennial_perennial @remkoschnorr @qlim_ @ingegrognard @alyunkka and everyone :) 💛

▶️ Åbn video direkte · se på Instagram
